page_metadata.biotools__summary: A 4-D image processing platform for the work with laser scanning and wide field microscopes. It provides a registration software for correcting global movements and local deformations of cells as well as 2-D and 3-D tracking software.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A 4-D image processing platform for the work with laser scanning and wide field microscopes. It provides a registration software for correcting global movements and local deformations of cells as well as 2-D and 3-D tracking software.
